action_plan.recommended_change: Pause entire Manual Keywords Campaign immediately. All 3 active keywords have ZERO conversions over 4+ weeks.
action_plan.rationale: This is the 10th consecutive day this action has been recommended. $308 lifetime spend with zero ad conversions. New settlement period started today — pausing now prevents further waste in the 4/11-4/25 cycle.

action_plan.recommended_change: Reduce daily budget from $15 to $5. Auto campaign has best CTR (0.42%) but still zero proven conversions.
action_plan.rationale: Auto campaign at $15/day is overspending for a product with 0% ad CVR. $5/day cap preserves data collection at lower cost while listing fixes are implemented.

action_plan.recommended_change: Add 'motion sensor', 'with app', 'wifi', 'wastewater separation' as negative exact-match keywords across all campaigns.
action_plan.rationale: Paw Pure lacks motion sensor (8/10 competitors have it), has no app/WiFi (HAPAW 2026 leads here), and no wastewater separation. Auto campaign likely bidding on these irrelevant searches.

action_plan.recommended_change: Pause this specific keyword if campaign-level pause is not possible. Highest single-keyword spend at $22.50/week with zero conversions.
action_plan.rationale: Primary keyword SV 18,100 but 0% CVR over 4+ weeks. $22.50/week pure waste. Not converting despite decent 0.43% CTR — indicates listing/price/review issues, not targeting issues.

action_plan.recommended_change: Add as exact-match keyword at $0.50 CPC bid. SV 7,200, 7/10 competitors ranking. Launch only after fixing listing CVR.
action_plan.rationale: Highest-priority keyword gap. 7 of 10 competitors use 'battery operated' terminology. Paw Pure listing already mentions 'battery-operated' in title — should index.

action_plan.recommended_change: Add as exact-match keyword at $0.50 CPC bid. SV 4,100. Paw Pure's 20dB claim is a genuine differentiator.
action_plan.rationale: Paw Pure's 'Quiet 20 dB' spec is in the title — unique competitive advantage. Targeting this keyword aligns ad traffic with a real product differentiator.

action_plan.recommended_change: Move from auto campaign to manual exact-match at $0.50 bid. Best CTR (0.42%) of all active keywords deserves targeted testing at lower cost.
action_plan.rationale: SV 8,900 and 0.42% CTR shows relevance. Exact-match at $0.50 vs auto at $1.25 CPC cuts cost while maintaining targeting precision.

action_plan.keyword: automatic dog water fountain stainless steel
action_plan.recommended_change: Add as exact-match at $0.50 bid after adding 'dogs' to listing title. SV 4,800.
action_plan.rationale: Dog-focused keywords represent 10,100+ combined search volume. Title already mentions 'Small Dogs' — may already index. Test with low bid.

action_plan.recommended_change: Launch Request-a-Review for all delivered fountain orders. Reviews are the #1 CVR blocker — no PPC optimization will fix a 20-review listing competing against 5,000+ review competitors.
action_plan.rationale: Root cause of 0% ad CVR is likely the review gap. Every new review incrementally improves conversion. This is prerequisite to profitable PPC.

action_plan.recommended_change: Deactivate bundle listing — zero sales lifetime, buy box issues. Clean up catalog to avoid confusing shoppers.
action_plan.rationale: Bundle has never sold a unit. Keeping it active may split traffic or confuse customers comparing options.
